plainLyrics:
Headlights roll across the avenue
We find the beat in every passing view
Turn the chorus up and let it ride
Singing with the skyline by our side
syncedLyrics:
[00:00.00]Headlights roll across the avenue
[00:05.00]We find the beat in every passing view
[00:10.00]Turn the chorus up and let it ride
[00:15.00]Singing with the skyline by our side
[00:20.00]Every green light keeps the rhythm alive
[00:25.00]We carry the melody into the night
